title: Kazzmon's Resources
description: A Resource Pack for All of my Datapacks!
body:
**Kazzmon's Resources** is a Resource Pack required in order to fully experience the content on my Datapacks.

This pack includes custom textures for all of the new items and other stuff introduced on my Datapacks. Keep in mind that other Resource Packs may overwrite this and may display a different texture.
